releases.name: v3.5.9
releases.body:
| Vearch Version | Python SDK Version | Go SDK Version |
|----------------|--------------------|----------------|
| v3.5.9         | v3.5.5             | v3.5.3         |

## What's Changed
Added
* [feat: realtime searching](https://github.com/vearch/vearch/commit/ffeb8cfd92d0402f685a7097fafcf241551bd3ae)
* [feat: add slow search isolation](https://github.com/vearch/vearch/commit/58e7c27de025eec7565636a6ece425bac28c8a38)
* [feat: implement nearby read connection client type](https://github.com/vearch/vearch/commit/21e30283eb9758192f4e76f5c77985482c6e8c9c)
* [feat: Add memory circuit breaker and kill slow query](https://github.com/vearch/vearch/commit/6b4e1bde558cd2c52a7fe2ddc272413d85277e5e)
* [feat: support pagination](https://github.com/vearch/vearch/commit/459dfd647763c471e706a1c23be3e289d8115504)
* [feat: search with partition names](https://github.com/vearch/vearch/commit/8376e0696775a20a94d836c022d72105ff8dd9f8)
* [feat: core engine python sdk](https://github.com/vearch/vearch/commit/ed217775fe056696d1b5b286b6a9080fc2a584fb)
* [feat: support gpu ivfpq index search](https://github.com/vearch/vearch/commit/2a780baa07c856f6bb71d966e102efef22147f3d)
* [feat: add prometheus metrics for master and ps](https://github.com/vearch/vearch/commit/70aca1a8353a6a110a6671059eff05893077445c)

Fixed
* [fix: fix physical backup](https://github.com/vearch/vearch/commit/ff3737a6c561e0ea0cd42369dcea0db6c47cb416)
* [fix: set value for httpRes and add default value for config](https://github.com/vearch/vearch/commit/f3255b3b811ec09c260dcdcacd585c4b95eebf57)
* [fix: check partition leader before register to master](https://github.com/vearch/vearch/commit/8dc4fb9c9ba7de995882ba991fd48ba70ea38f89)
* [fix: raft server can't get node replica info (](https://github.com/vearch/vearch/commit/097c6a7f52bec072b9f39b188db75aabf91691e0)
* [fix: delete existed partiton when create space failed](https://github.com/vearch/vearch/commit/8bf2882b1dd72f2b3107dc74b1d484b04a0794d5)
* [hotfix:fix write out of range and check topK limit](https://github.com/vearch/vearch/commit/0fe45392a8c4126f57ddd63607f834b4e4be3780)
* [fix: fix concurrent wirte response issue](https://github.com/vearch/vearch/commit/c9b4d74634a549a730cc4ba05f45ed3031550189)

## New Contributors
* @Anpeihang made their first contribution in https://github.com/vearch/vearch/pull/863

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/vearch/vearch/compare/v3.5.8...v3.5.9

releases.name: v3.5.8
releases.body:
| Vearch Version | Python SDK Version | Go SDK Version |
|----------------|--------------------|----------------|
| v3.5.8         | v3.5.5             | v3.5.3         |

## What's Changed
Added
* [feat: add docid to _id map into memory](https://github.com/vearch/vearch/commit/73287cd3a95d4fa240522d6fa032bb863d82ac22)
* [feat: refactor GPU index architecture and add IVFFLAT GPU support with modular base classes](https://github.com/vearch/vearch/commit/7cf9d62d2c43f7eab58453ac0607337c3bed0d3e)
* [feat(add rust sdk for vearch): add rust sdk support rust sdk for vearch](https://github.com/vearch/vearch/commit/ec27514b1741a4f3c7e911b6a0cad7c545a88c34)
* [feat: enhance MultiFieldsRangeIndex to support string array fields and improve document query handling](https://github.com/vearch/vearch/commit/1a7cc7a498f4a54d7483d9acd73054e26f73803d)
* [feat: add early termination optimization for topn queries in MultiFieldsRangeIndex](https://github.com/vearch/vearch/commit/de373331009cfb4334c0ef4ed24f8b886ed320f6)
* [feat: implement dynamic management of scalar indexes in space service](https://github.com/vearch/vearch/commit/2ffeac64d03c956c28ddeea8c6bfcbb8b4093113)
* [feat: implement dynamic vector field management via updateSpace API](https://github.com/vearch/vearch/commit/46b2c6f89af38ad311777d9b4cfb62bcff946a42)
* [feat: add query limit for vearch](https://github.com/vearch/vearch/commit/e363dff1eaaf07b3624192a75c648016159fa826)
* [feat: add auto brute force search mode selection](https://github.com/vearch/vearch/commit/f71b3d7ddcc7939ed9c3a94e3183a1eb692ec85b)
* [feat: automatically check resource for partitions](https://github.com/vearch/vearch/commit/7559405e8a8a2b62d9fa3b2408db7a81988e9b38)
* [feat: support refresh_interval](https://github.com/vearch/vearch/commit/4072e926a175f2dfd8e6d21c6ea2547f7abba9cd)
* [feat: implement show flamegraph in web ui](https://github.com/vearch/vearch/commit/6274c47ee46b291a14ac5e49a53d878d57fc9d89)
* [feat: Add "<>" not equal operator](https://github.com/vearch/vearch/commit/f5d8cacbcd701c98b1cf4b6d2881ac2e419f9dd3)

Changed
* [perf: add trace info for partitions](https://github.com/vearch/vearch/commit/339b5969c365e01b3ca69e3d575022c880dae696)
* [perf(python sdk): reduce the overhead of checking the schema when upsert data](https://github.com/vearch/vearch/commit/2b1f1d41377d3d425c9d767b95e58d043532dd04)
* [[perf: enhance GPU Indexing for IVFFLAT and IVFPQ](https://github.com/vearch/vearch/commit/187dbe9dbc49a3f76619045dc2f708215f7f11f2)]
* [refactor: set rpcx and raft log level](https://github.com/vearch/vearch/commit/a18a1af3ac002d237174fc59876a69406d596377)

Fixed
* [fix: fix missing string field deletion when deleting documents](https://github.com/vearch/vearch/commit/6511ff478728ff08a8514c546c9e439767941c40)
* [fix: clean up partitions when creating space failed](https://github.com/vearch/vearch/commit/d198b564008c8e91fdf3058823ca0c6b386e4b6a)
* [fix: add counter to avoid close index](https://github.com/vearch/vearch/commit/b4893874d69e0b727f92ffd532ace92c07ca718b)
* [fix: check refresh interval for compatibility](https://github.com/vearch/vearch/commit/d95b1e85a202972915e192588f248a176eb44e0d)
* [fix: check empty partition rule](https://github.com/vearch/vearch/commit/bb3b53391b206ba931d389564d0d4c7cbefb4812)
* [fix: id can be negetive for multi getting](https://github.com/vearch/vearch/commit/75b0c77756f9d3543f4f85d4ea6a3a6066d14d29)
* [fix: prevent crash when writing to canceled context](https://github.com/vearch/vearch/commit/66c0db7e7762e4ca6c981839d59d79255d6cbc5d)


## New Contributors
* @fanjia1024 made their first contribution in https://github.com/vearch/vearch/pull/847
* @KuangXiaoXinFei made their first contribution in https://github.com/vearch/vearch/pull/848

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/vearch/vearch/compare/v3.5.7...v3.5.8

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/vearch/vearch/compare/v3.5.4...v3.5.5

readme_html:
Overview

Vearch is a cloud-native distributed vector database for efficient similarity search of embedding vectors in your AI applications.

Key features

  • Hybrid search: Both vector search and scalar filtering.

  • Performance: Fast vector retrieval - search from millions of objects in milliseconds.

  • Scalability & Reliability: Replication and elastic scaling out.

Document

Restful APIs

  • Tutorial | 参考文档

OpenAPIs

  • API Documentation

SDK

SDK Description
Python SDK Python client for Vearch
Go SDK Go client for Vearch
Java SDK Java client for Vearch
Rust SDK Rust client for Vearch

Usage Cases

Use Vearch as a Memory Backend

Vearch integrates with popular AI frameworks:

Framework Integration
Langchain Use Vearch as vector store in Langchain
LlamaIndex Integrate with LlamaIndex for knowledge bases
Langchaingo Go implementation of Langchain with Vearch support
LangChain4j Java implementation with Vearch integration

Real world Demos

  • VisualSearch: Vearch can be leveraged to build a complete visual search system to index billions of images. The image retrieval plugin for object detection and feature extraction is also required.

Quick start

Kubernetes Deployment

# Via Helm Repository
$ helm repo add vearch https://vearch.github.io/vearch-helm
$ helm repo update && helm install my-release vearch/vearch

# Or from Local Charts
$ git clone https://github.com/vearch/vearch-helm.git && cd vearch-helm
$ helm install my-release ./charts -f ./charts/values.yaml

Docker Compose Deployment

# Standalone Mode
$ cd cloud && cp ../config/config.toml .
$ docker-compose --profile standalone up -d

# Cluster Mode
$ cd cloud && cp ../config/config_cluster.toml .
$ docker-compose --profile cluster up -d

Other Deployment Methods

  • DeployByDocker: Deploy Vearch by Docker
  • SourceCompileDeployment: Compile Vearch from source code

Components

Vearch Architecture

Master: Responsible for schema management, cluster-level metadata, and resource coordination.

Router: Provides RESTful API: upsert, delete, search and query; request routing, and result merging.

PartitionServer (PS): Hosts document partitions with raft-based replication. Gamma is the core vector search engine implemented based on faiss. It provides the ability of storing, indexing and retrieving the vectors and scalars.

      title={The Design and Implementation of a Real Time Visual Search System on JD E-commerce Platform},
      author={Jie Li and Haifeng Liu and Chuanghua Gui and Jianyu Chen and Zhenyun Ni and Ning Wang},
